description: Add hard technical lock in code to enforce $2 stake baseline. Do NOT rely on config-based soft rules. Lock should be in trade execution function, not configuration.
reason: Soft reversion rules have failed 100% of the time over 144+ hours. $5 stakes are destroying profitability (at 94% win rate, $5 stakes = -$17 to -$28 P&L per 50 trades vs +$18-22 at $2 stakes). Hard lock is the only solution.
